visual_description: A man in a pink plaid shirt bends over a beige couch, then stands up holding a white object while facing a man in a blue plaid shirt. The man in pink looks at the other man with raised eyebrows, appearing surprised. The scene includes a framed picture on the wall, two wall-mounted lamps, and a door marked 232.
